title: refactor(shared): dedupe gen/enter twin infra modules into shared
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Hoists the 7 twin infra modules duplicated between gen and enter (`error.ts`, `events.ts`, `util.ts`, `logger.ts`, `cache.ts`, `middleware/validator.ts`, `utils/api-docs.ts`) into `shared/` as single source of truth; deletes both originals and rewrites all imports (net **-1,062 lines**).
- `error.ts` unified on the gen superset — the only semantic deltas were gen's `errorCode` override (#11722) and the 426 status entry; both are no-ops for enter, which never constructs `UpstreamError`. Enter's unreachable upstream-error machinery is now live shared code (gen has 15+ `ensureUpstreamOk` call sites).
- Deletes gen's dead Polar/tier-event code (`PolarEvent`, `flattenBalances`, dead `sendTierEventToTinybird` copy — zero callers since #10466/#10625); enter's live tier-event sender is the shared one.
- Unifies `cache.ts` generics, so `shared/utils/model-stats.ts` imports `cached` directly — removes the documented `CachedFn` injection workaround at both call sites.
- Single `ApiKeyType` definition in `shared/auth/api-key-creation.ts`; deletes `InsertGenerationEvent`/`SelectGenerationEvent` aliases; removes the never-populated legacy `user_tier` field from the chat-completion schema + the `@pollinations/mcp` pass-through.

Not included: `middleware/logger.ts` stays per-service (gen's credential-query redaction is intentional drift); gen's unused `TINYBIRD_TIER_INGEST_URL` wrangler.toml/bindings vars left alone (adjacent-line conflict risk with #11705/#11171); `track.ts` keeps a local `TinybirdEvent as InsertGenerationEvent` import alias to avoid touching billing-PR territory (#11683/#11721) beyond import lines.

Note: `package-lock.json` regenerated at root (adds `hono`/`hono-openapi` to `shared/package.json` + npm metadata normalization) — may conflict with #11754/#11752 siblings; regenerate on rebase.

Tests: gen `tsc --noEmit` clean, 42 files / 328 tests pass; enter `npm run typecheck` clean, full suite 26 files / 466 tests pass.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://

gist.headline: Less Code, Same Buzz
gist.blurb: We just deleted over 1,000 lines of duplicate code by merging our twin infrastructure modules into a single shared library. A cleaner codebase means faster updates and fewer bugs hiding in the weeds!
gist.summary: Refactored the gen and enter services to use a single shared infrastructure library, removing over 1,000 lines of duplicated code across error handling, caching, and event logging.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup makes the codebase easier to maintain and reduces the risk of inconsistent behavior between the API gateway and billing services.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot organizing files or sweeping up duplicate code blocks into a single shared bin. A tidy, organized workspace representing deduplication.
